31: This appendix provides a comprehensive overview of prompting, reframing it as a
32: disciplined engineering practice rather than a simple act of asking questions. Its
33: central purpose is to demonstrate how to transform general-purpose language
34: models into specialized, reliable, and highly capable tools for specific tasks. The
35: journey begins with non-negotiable core principles like clarity, conciseness, and
36: iterative experimentation, which are the bedrock of effective communication with AI.
37: These principles are critical because they reduce the inherent ambiguity in natural
38: language, helping to steer the model's probabilistic outputs toward a single, correct
39: intention. Building on this foundation, basic techniques such as zero-shot, one-shot,
40: and few-shot prompting serve as the primary methods for demonstrating expected
41: behavior through examples. These methods provide varying levels of contextual
42: guidance, powerfully shaping the model's response style, tone, and format. Beyond
43: just examples, structuring prompts with explicit roles, system-level instructions, and
